analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet praises China as a firm supporter and practitioner of multilateralism and the UN, citing proposals on upholding multilateralism, democratizing international relations, safeguarding an international order based on law, and promoting solidarity and cooperation. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West is immoral/hostile): Not present—no criticism of the West or depiction of China as a victim. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—the tweet frames China as cooperative, supportive of the UN, international law, multilateralism, and global solidarity, which fits CH2’s emphasis on benevolent, rules-based, mutually beneficial international conduct. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced—no historical adversity or CCP-led resilience. CH4 (appropriate political system and honorable values, domestically): Not applicable—the content is about China’s international posture, not its domestic system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds domestically/technologically): Not discussed. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2 only.
